title: linzia gerberiformis
intro: Linzia gerberiformis, also known as Mexican prickly poppy or Mexican poppy, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linzia gerberiformis include relief from pain, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are made by drying and processing the leaves and flowers, and are used to treat various health conditions.
